THEHEROEXPANSION-TRY_AGAIN.description:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Put an Attack in your [gold]Hand[/gold] on top of your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] and [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [purple]Sharp {Sharp:diff()}[/purple]
THEHEROEXPANSION-TRY_AGAIN.selectionScre: Select an Attack to Enchant with Sharp {Sharp:diff()}.
THEHEROEXPANSION-TRY_AGAIN.title: Try Again
THEHEROEXPANSION-SUFFOCATE.description:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
If the enemy is [gold]Vulnerable[/gold], apply {WeakPower:diff()} [gold]Weak[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-SUFFOCATE.title: Suffocate
THEHEROEXPANSION-FROM_THE_GRAVE.descript:
Gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold].
Whenever this card is [gold]Exhausted[/gold], gain {Block:diff()} [gold]Block[/gold] and add a copy of it to your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-FROM_THE_GRAVE.title: From the Grave
THEHEROEXPANSION-BEAST_WITHIN.descriptio:
Apply {VulnerablePower:diff()} [gold]Vulnerable[/gold].
Whenever you deal single target damage to a [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] enemy, deal that much damage to ALL other enemies
THEHEROEXPANSION-BEAST_WITHIN.title: Beast Within
THEHEROEXPANSION-BETTER_DAYS.description: Whenever you lose HP, Heal {BetterDaysPower:diff()} HP.
THEHEROEXPANSION-BETTER_DAYS.title: Better Days
THEHEROEXPANSION-BUTTERFLY_KNIFE.title: Butterfly Knife
THEHEROEXPANSION-REPURPOSE.description: At the end of your turn, [gold]Retain[/gold] 1 card and [gold]Enchant[/gold] it with [purple]Advantageous {Advantageous:diff()}[/purple].
THEHEROEXPANSION-REPURPOSE.title: Repurpose
THEHEROEXPANSION-BEHIND_YOU.title: Behind You
THEHEROEXPANSION-VOLCANIC_VIPER.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold].
Trigger the enemy's [gold]Poison[/gold] once.
THEHEROEXPANSION-VOLCANIC_VIPER.title: Volcanic Viper
THEHEROEXPANSION-CEASE_TO_EXIST.descript:
Gain {IntangiblePower:diff()} [gold]Intangible[/gold].
For the next {CeaseToExistPower:diff()} turns, You cannot use Attacks.
THEHEROEXPANSION-CEASE_TO_EXIST.title: Cease To Exist
THEHEROEXPANSION-BOUNCING_BLADE.descript:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage.
Apply {PoisonPower:diff()} [gold]Poison[/gold]
Add [gold]Replay[/gold] 1 to ALL Bouncing Blades this combat
THEHEROEXPANSION-BOUNCING_BLADE.title: Bouncing Blade
THEHEROEXPANSION-WORK.title: WORK!
THEHEROEXPANSION-STRIKE_THE_EARTH.descri:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage
[gold]Enchant[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [purple]Royal[/purple]
THEHEROEXPANSION-STRIKE_THE_EARTH.select: Select a card to Enchant with Royal.
THEHEROEXPANSION-STRIKE_THE_EARTH.title: Strike The Earth
THEHEROEXPANSION-SERVE.description: At the start of your turn, add 1 [gold]Minion Duty[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-SERVE.title: SERVE!!
THEHEROEXPANSION-JOY_OF_CREATION.title: Joy Of Creation
THEHEROEXPANSION-THE_WORLD.description: Take an extra turn after this one
THEHEROEXPANSION-THE_WORLD.title: The World
THEHEROEXPANSION-EDGE_OF_DESTINY.descrip: Your [gold]Sovereign Blade[/gold] hits an additional time for {EdgeOfDestinyPower:diff()}X damage, where X is the number of {singleStarIcon} you have.
THEHEROEXPANSION-EDGE_OF_DESTINY.title: Edge of Destiny
THEHEROEXPANSION-MINION_LABOR.title: Minion Labor
THEHEROEXPANSION-MINION_DUTY.title: Minion Duty
THEHEROEXPANSION-SWIPE.description:
[gold]Osty[/gold] deals {OstyDamage:diff()} damage to ALL enemies.
[gold]Summon[/gold] {Summon:diff()} for each enemy hit.
THEHEROEXPANSION-SWIPE.title: Swipe
THEHEROEXPANSION-INSTANT_ANIMA.descripti: [gold]Enchant[/gold] a Non 0{energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)} card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [purple]Haunted[/purple]
THEHEROEXPANSION-INSTANT_ANIMA.selection: Select a card to Enchant with Haunted.
THEHEROEXPANSION-INSTANT_ANIMA.title: Instant Anima
THEHEROEXPANSION-SODA_POP.description:
Gain {Energy:energyIcons()}.
Add a [gold]Soul[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
[gold]Osty[/gold] heals {Heal:diff()} HP.
THEHEROEXPANSION-SODA_POP.title: Soda Pop
THEHEROEXPANSION-RIGOR_MORTIS.title: Rigor Mortis
THEHEROEXPANSION-PERISH_SONG.title: Perish Song
THEHEROEXPANSION-SPLIT_SHARD.title: Split Shard
THEHEROEXPANSION-SHADOW_BOXING.descripti:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage
[gold]Enchant[/gold] a card in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [purple]Ravenous[/purple].
THEHEROEXPANSION-SHADOW_BOXING.selection: Select a card to Enchant with Ravenous.
THEHEROEXPANSION-SHADOW_BOXING.title: Shadow Boxing
THEHEROEXPANSION-BIT_FLIP.description:
[gold]Evoke[/gold] all of your Orbs.
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Lightning[/gold] for each [gold]Frost[/gold].
[gold]Channel[/gold] 1 [gold]Frost[/gold] for each [gold]Lightning[/gold]
THEHEROEXPANSION-BIT_FLIP.title: Bit Flip
THEHEROEXPANSION-NANOMACHINES.descriptio: Whenever you play a Power, Play {Cards:diff()} random {Cards:plural:Attack|Attacks} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-NANOMACHINES.title: Nanomachines
THEHEROEXPANSION-KILL_DRIVE.title: Kill Drive
THEHEROEXPANSION-LIGHT_BUSTER.descriptio:
Deal {Damage:diff()} damage,
[gold]Evoke[/gold] your rightmost Orb and add it's [gold]Evoke[/gold] effect to this card.{OrbEffects}
THEHEROEXPANSION-LIGHT_BUSTER.title: Light Buster
THEHEROEXPANSION-MAGIC_PEN.description: Enchant an Attack or Skill in your [gold]Hand[/gold] with [purple]Dreamy[/purple]
THEHEROEXPANSION-MAGIC_PEN.selectionScre: Select an Attack or Skill to Enchant with Dreamy.
THEHEROEXPANSION-MAGIC_PEN.title: Magic Pen
THEHEROEXPANSION-REINFORCED_BODY.title: Reinforced Body
THEHEROEXPANSION-EXHUME.description: Put a card from your [gold]Exhaust Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-EXHUME.selectionScreenP: Select {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} to put in your Hand.
THEHEROEXPANSION-EXHUME.title: Exhume
THEHEROEXPANSION-CONCENTRATE.title: Concentrate
THEHEROEXPANSION-REMEMBER.description: Add [gold]Retain[/gold] to every card in hand{IfUpgraded:show: and Upgrade them.|.}
THEHEROEXPANSION-REMEMBER.title: Remember
THEHEROEXPANSION-RESENT.description:
Choose {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Discard Pile[/gold]
Play {Cards:plural:it|them} for free
THEHEROEXPANSION-RESENT.title: Resent
THEHEROEXPANSION-SEEK.description: Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-SEEK.selectionScreenPro: Select {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} to put in your Hand.
THEHEROEXPANSION-SEEK.title: Seek
THEHEROEXPANSION-VAKUUS_PRANK.descriptio:
{IfUpgraded:show:[red][shake]More? Alright, Have fun.[/shake][/red]
}At the end of your turn, Take {VakuusPrankPower:diff()} Damage.
THEHEROEXPANSION-VAKUUS_PRANK.title: Vakuu's Prank
THEHEROEXPANSION-LUNCH_BREAK.description:
{IfUpgraded:show:You patched the engravings.
The wounds burn less now
Heal {Heal:diff()} HP.|A Note engraved on your arm.
[red][shake]Out for lunch. You can handle this without me. Right?[/shake][/red]}
THEHEROEXPANSION-LUNCH_BREAK.title: Lunch Break
THEHEROEXPANSION-DEMONIC_SURGE.descripti:
{IfUpgraded:show:[red][shake]Don't get smart with me[/shake][/red]
For the next {DemonicCripplePower:diff()} Turns, Attacks deal half damage|This turn, Attacks deal double damage.}
THEHEROEXPANSION-DEMONIC_SURGE.title: Demonic Surge
THEHEROEXPANSION-QUICK_THOUGHT.title: Quick Thought
THEHEROEXPANSION-HUMBLE_OFFERING.title: Humble Offering
THEHEROEXPANSION-COGNITION_BLIP.title: Cognition Blip
THEHEROEXPANSION-ENGRAVE.title: Engrave
THEHEROEXPANSION-GLITTER_BOMB.selectionS: Select a card to enchant with Glam.
THEHEROEXPANSION-GLITTER_BOMB.title: Glitter Bomb
THEHEROEXPANSION-SPECTRE.title: Spectre
THEHEROEXPANSION-FORBIDDEN_POWER.descrip:
{IfUpgraded:show:[red][shake]Greed corrupts all[/shake][/red]
}[gold]Enchant[/gold] every attack in your hand with [purple]{IfUpgraded:show:Doomsday|Corrupted}[/purple].
THEHEROEXPANSION-FORBIDDEN_POWER.title: Forbidden Power
THEHEROEXPANSION-GRANTED_CONTRACT.descri:
{IfUpgraded:show:[red][shake]Such a shame.[/shake][/red]
}Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Discard|Draw} Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-GRANTED_CONTRACT.select: Select {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} to put in your Hand.
THEHEROEXPANSION-GRANTED_CONTRACT.title: Granted Contract
THEHEROEXPANSION-DISCARDED_CONTRACT.desc:
{IfUpgraded:show:[red][shake]Changed your mind?[/shake][/red]
}Put {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} from your [gold]{IfUpgraded:show:Draw|Discard} Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
THEHEROEXPANSION-DISCARDED_CONTRACT.sele: Select {Cards:diff()} {Cards:plural:card|cards} to put in your Hand.
THEHEROEXPANSION-BOTTLED_DYNAMISM.title: Bottled Dynamism
